Objects.Name: [Module] Red Coin
Objects.Notes: A collectable red coin, similar to that of Super Mario 64. Usually, eight of them have to be collected.

Objects.Name: [Module] Red Coin Group
Objects.Notes: Controls a collection of Red Coins and activates something once all are collected.

Classes.Name: RedCoin
Classes.Notes: A collectable Red Coin. Usually, eight of these are linked together by a RedCoinController to trigger a switch, but more can be added.

Obj_arg0.Name: SW_B Launch Velocity
Obj_arg0.Description: The upward velocity of the coin when it spawns through SW_B. Default is 250.

Obj_arg1.Name: Player Collect Layout?
Obj_arg1.Description: If set, the number layout will appear at the player rather than the coin.

Obj_arg3.Name: Shadow Calculation
Obj_arg3.Description: If set, the shadow will be calculated at all times and the game takes the shadow range into account when clipping.

Obj_arg4.Name: Pose Type
Obj_arg4.Description: Defines how to position and rotate the Coin. May also connect the Coin to the collision below in SMG2.

Values.Notes: Rotation & shadow direction affected by gravity
Rotation ignores gravity & shadow direction affected by gravity
Attach to collision below & shadow direction not affected by gravity (SMG2 only)

Obj_arg5.Name: Shadow Length
Obj_arg5.Description: Sets the shadow drop length. Default is 1000.

Obj_arg7.Name: Inside Bubble?
Obj_arg7.Description: If true, the Coin will be placed inside an Air Bubble.

SW_APPEAR.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.

SW_B.Description: Appears and pops up when this switch is activated.

Group.Description: The group of red coins and their controller.

Classes.Name: RedCoinController
Classes.Notes: Controls a group of Star Chips (BlueChip) and activates SW_A once all of them have been collected. It is recommended to have five Star Chips per group. The group for this object and the individual Blue Star Chips has to be specified using Obj_arg0. This controller is also responsible for displaying the counter layout at the top of the screen.

Obj_arg0.Name: Reward Coins?
Obj_arg0.Description: If set, collecting any Red Coin linked to this object will reward the player with 2 coins.

Obj_arg1.Name: Power Star ID
Obj_arg1.Description: The scenario ID of the Power Star to be spawned. -1 does not register a Power Star.

Obj_arg2.Name: PictureFont Icon ID
Obj_arg2.Description: Specifies the icon to use from PictureFont. Default is 55, which is a Power Star icon.

Obj_arg3.Name: Layout Behavior
Obj_arg3.Description: Specifies what condition needs to be met for the Red Coin layout to appear.

SW_A.Description: Gets activated when all linked Red Coins have been collected.

Group.Description: The group of the red coin controller and its coins.
